COURT ORDERS FATHER SHALL HAVE VISITATION WITH MINORS EACH WEEK FROM SATURDAY 4:00 PM TO SUNDAY 7:00 PM; WHEN PATERNAL GRANDMOTHER IS IN TOWN, THE SATURDAY VISITATION S
HALL START AT 10:00 AM. PARENTS SHALL DO THE TRANSPORTATION AND THE EXCHANGE SHALL TAKE PLACE OUTSIDE THE RESIDENCES. FATHER IS NOT TO CONSUME
ILD SUPPORT OF $820/MONTH RETROACTIVE TO 1/21/00. WHEN MOTHER RETURNS TO WORK, COUNSEL ARE TO CONFER AND CONSIDER: FATHER'S SECOND JOB, MOTHER'S
